title: Ession Freedom Front
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Ession Freedom Front''' was one of [[Ession]]'s most violent revolutionary party. [[Lumiya|Silfinia]] and [[Darth Caedus|Najack Ell]] were registered members. [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] and [[Lumiya]] adopted their identities when infiltrating a meeting of the [[Confederation]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]'' {{1stm}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
